description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant silver hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Carry this with tonal ensembles for a pared-back chic. Height: 32 cmWidth: 43 cmDepth: 12 cm Textured leatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing and a metallic brand badge on the front Buckle and rivet detailing on the sides Rivet and crystal detailing on the front Two handles One main zippered compartment with a zippered separator, two pouches and a zippered pocket Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
